title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.530 - Members of the regional investment district commission reimbursed, when
text:
70.530.  Members of the regional investment district commission reimbursed, when. — Missouri members of the regional investment district commission, appointed under section 70.515, shall be reimbursed for actual and necessary expenses incurred in the performance of their official duties.
(L. 2006 S.B. 825)
